summary: This document is an internal sales playbook for KeepMeCompany's AI communication services targeting private clinics in Spain. It details sales scripts, value propositions, demo workflows, and pricing strategies (€0.53 per call). It also addresses data privacy compliance and common customer objections regarding the AI phone agent technology.
